docket_entries.description: WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANENE, ANGELA ONYETEMA AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC., A CORPORATION INGRAM, CLARISSA , AN INDIVIDUAL CHIDOM, GABRIELLA , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-12-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-11-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-20-2026

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON MAR-25-2026 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ANGELA ANENE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
